name: ReportDiscordPlus
description: A plugin that implements Reports on your server

report.description: Report a player with a specific reason

report.use.description: Allows you to use the /report command

report.bypasstime.description: Allows you to send reports without cooldown

report.mcreport.description: Allows you to see new report alerts without checking Discord

report.tp.description: Allows you to instantly teleport to the reported player

report.protection.description: Prevents the player from being reported
